name: SpaceX / 太空探索技术公司
sector: Aerospace, satellite communications and AI infrastructure / 航天、卫星通信与 AI 基础设施
summary: SpaceX 已在 Nasdaq 以 SPCX 交易。公司业务横跨 Falcon/Starship 发射、Dragon 载人/货运飞船、Starlink 卫星互联网、Starshield/政府航天和新增 AI 基础设施主题；上市后它从 SpaceX IPO 主题锚点变成可直接查询的上市公司。
summaryZh: SpaceX 已在 Nasdaq 以 SPCX 交易。公司业务横跨 Falcon/Starship 发射、Dragon 载人/货运飞船、Starlink 卫星互联网、Starshield/政府航天和新增 AI 基础设施主题；上市后它从 SpaceX IPO 主题锚点变成可直接查询的上市公司。
summaryEn: SpaceX now trades on Nasdaq under SPCX. Its businesses span Falcon/Starship launch, Dragon human/cargo spacecraft, Starlink satellite internet, Starshield/government space systems, and an emerging AI-infrastructure theme; after the listing it moves from a SpaceX IPO theme anchor to a directly searchable public company.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时
updateCadence.财务与公告: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每日
updateCadence.主营业务: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周
updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.overview: SpaceX 由发射与航天器、卫星通信服务、政府/国防航天和 AI/数据中心基础设施几条主线构成。
business.overviewZh: SpaceX 由发射与航天器、卫星通信服务、政府/国防航天和 AI/数据中心基础设施几条主线构成。
business.overviewEn: SpaceX is built around launch and spacecraft, satellite communications services, government/defense space systems, and AI/data-center infrastructure.

segments.name: Starlink 卫星互联网
segments.description: 面向消费者、企业、航空、海事和移动运营商伙伴提供低轨卫星宽带与直连手机能力。
segments.descriptionZh: 面向消费者、企业、航空、海事和移动运营商伙伴提供低轨卫星宽带与直连手机能力。
segments.descriptionEn: Provides low-Earth-orbit satellite broadband and direct-to-cell capability to consumers, enterprises, aviation, maritime, and mobile-operator partners.

segments.name: 发射与航天器
segments.description: Falcon 9/Falcon Heavy 发射、Dragon 载人/货运飞船，以及 Starship/Super Heavy 可复用超重型系统。
segments.descriptionZh: Falcon 9/Falcon Heavy 发射、Dragon 载人/货运飞船，以及 Starship/Super Heavy 可复用超重型系统。
segments.descriptionEn: Falcon 9/Falcon Heavy launch, Dragon human/cargo spacecraft, and the reusable Starship/Super Heavy system.

segments.name: 政府与国防航天
segments.description: 包括 NASA 商业载人、货运、Artemis HLS 和政府/国防任务；Starshield 等业务服务政府安全通信与地球观测等需求。
segments.descriptionZh: 包括 NASA 商业载人、货运、Artemis HLS 和政府/国防任务；Starshield 等业务服务政府安全通信与地球观测等需求。
segments.descriptionEn: Includes NASA commercial crew, cargo, Artemis HLS, and government/defense missions; Starshield-like businesses serve secure communications, Earth observation, and related government needs.

segments.name: AI 与计算基础设施
segments.description: IPO 报道显示，SpaceX 的新叙事已包括 AI/数据中心基础设施；这一部分仍需后续 SEC 披露进一步拆分。
segments.descriptionZh: IPO 报道显示，SpaceX 的新叙事已包括 AI/数据中心基础设施；这一部分仍需后续 SEC 披露进一步拆分。
segments.descriptionEn: IPO coverage indicates that SpaceX's new narrative includes AI/data-center infrastructure; this segment still needs fuller SEC disclosure before detailed separation.

business.description: SpaceX 由发射与航天器、卫星通信服务、政府/国防航天和 AI/数据中心基础设施几条主线构成。
business.descriptionZh: SpaceX 由发射与航天器、卫星通信服务、政府/国防航天和 AI/数据中心基础设施几条主线构成。
business.descriptionEn: SpaceX is built around launch and spacecraft, satellite communications services, government/defense space systems, and AI/data-center infrastructure.
revenueModel: Starlink 订阅与终端 / Starlink subscriptions and terminals
商业和政府发射 / Commercial and government launch
NASA/政府合同 / NASA and government contracts
AI/数据中心基础设施 / AI and data-center infrastructure
business.thesis: SpaceX 已成为公开上市的太空、卫星互联网和 AI 基础设施综合体；核心看点是 Starlink 现金生成、发射复用能力、政府合同黏性与 AI 基础设施资本开支之间的平衡。
business.thesisZh: SpaceX 已成为公开上市的太空、卫星互联网和 AI 基础设施综合体；核心看点是 Starlink 现金生成、发射复用能力、政府合同黏性与 AI 基础设施资本开支之间的平衡。
business.thesisEn: SpaceX is now a public space, satellite-internet, and AI-infrastructure conglomerate; the core question is the balance between Starlink cash generation, reusable-launch advantage, government-contract durability, and AI-infrastructure capital intensity.
riskNotes: IPO 后估值极高，短期股价会受到指数纳入、锁定期、流动性和新闻情绪影响。 / Post-IPO valuation is very high, so near-term trading can be driven by index inclusion, lockups, liquidity, and news sentiment.
Starship、直接手机连接和 AI 基础设施仍有技术、监管与资本开支风险。 / Starship, direct-to-cell, and AI infrastructure carry technology, regulatory, and capital-spending risks.
供应链高度依赖航天级材料、半导体/RF 元件、发射场许可和政府客户节奏。 / The supply chain depends on space-grade materials, semiconductor/RF components, launch-site approvals, and government-customer timing.

failureConditions.condition: IPO 后估值极高，短期股价会受到指数纳入、锁定期、流动性和新闻情绪影响。 / Post-IPO valuation is very high, so near-term trading can be driven by index inclusion, lockups, liquidity, and news sentiment.
failureConditions.conditionZh: IPO 后估值极高，短期股价会受到指数纳入、锁定期、流动性和新闻情绪影响。 / Post-IPO valuation is very high, so near-term trading can be driven by index inclusion, lockups, liquidity, and news sentiment.
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if filings, announcements, or operating data show this risk is not affecting orders, margins, capacity, or customer adoption.
failureConditions.monitor: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。

failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

failureConditions.condition: Starship、直接手机连接和 AI 基础设施仍有技术、监管与资本开支风险。 / Starship, direct-to-cell, and AI infrastructure carry technology, regulatory, and capital-spending risks.
failureConditions.conditionZh: Starship、直接手机连接和 AI 基础设施仍有技术、监管与资本开支风险。 / Starship, direct-to-cell, and AI infrastructure carry technology, regulatory, and capital-spending risks.

failureConditions.conditionZh: 供应链高度依赖航天级材料、半导体/RF 元件、发射场许可和政府客户节奏。 / The supply chain depends on space-grade materials, semiconductor/RF components, launch-site approvals, and government-customer timing.

failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

supplyChain.thesis: SpaceX 的上游可分为火箭/航天器制造、Starlink 卫星与终端、地面网络/发射场、AI/数据中心基础设施四层；公司大量垂直整合，未具名披露的供应商应先按类别跟踪，避免误判直接供应关系。
supplyChain.thesisZh: SpaceX 的上游可分为火箭/航天器制造、Starlink 卫星与终端、地面网络/发射场、AI/数据中心基础设施四层；公司大量垂直整合，未具名披露的供应商应先按类别跟踪，避免误判直接供应关系。
supplyChain.thesisEn: SpaceX's upstream can be split into rocket/spacecraft manufacturing, Starlink satellites and terminals, ground-network/launch-site infrastructure, and AI/data-center infrastructure; because the company is highly vertically integrated, undisclosed suppliers should be tracked by category first to avoid overstating direct supplier relationships.

relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The target company itself, used as the reference point for this supply-chain analysis.

materialsZh: 不锈钢与镍基高温合金
航天级半导体/RF 元件
太阳能电池与电池材料

tiers.notesZh: 目标公司本身；上市状态已更新为 NASDAQ SPCX。
tiers.notesEn: Target company itself; listing status is now updated to NASDAQ SPCX.

tiers.title: Rocket, spacecraft, and launch operations
tiers.titleZh: 火箭、航天器与发射运营

entities.name: 航天级结构材料与推进剂供应链
entities.nameZh: 航天级结构材料与推进剂供应链
entities.nameEn: Space-grade structural-material and propellant supply chain
entities.relationship: 支撑 Falcon、Dragon、Starship/Super Heavy 的箭体、发动机、热防护、压力容器和发射消耗品；当前按类别跟踪，未断言具体供应商。
entities.relationshipZh: 支撑 Falcon、Dragon、Starship/Super Heavy 的箭体、发动机、热防护、压力容器和发射消耗品；当前按类别跟踪，未断言具体供应商。
entities.relationshipEn: Supports Falcon, Dragon, and Starship/Super Heavy vehicle structures, engines, thermal protection, pressure vessels, and launch consumables; tracked by category without asserting named suppliers.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Converts chips, networking, cooling, and system design into deliverable systems; strong relevance but usually below manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: 发射场、地面设备与测试基础设施
entities.nameZh: 发射场、地面设备与测试基础设施
entities.relationship: 发射节奏依赖发射台、燃料/氧化剂装载、测试台、海上回收和监管许可；这是 SpaceX 复用优势的运营底座。
entities.relationshipZh: 发射节奏依赖发射台、燃料/氧化剂装载、测试台、海上回收和监管许可；这是 SpaceX 复用优势的运营底座。
entities.relationshipEn: Launch cadence depends on pads, propellant/oxidizer loading, test stands, droneship recovery, and regulatory approvals; this is the operating base for SpaceX's reusability advantage.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

companies: 航天级结构材料与推进剂供应链
发射场、地面设备与测试基础设施
materials: 不锈钢与镍基高温合金
materialsZh: 不锈钢与镍基高温合金
tiers.notes: SpaceX 垂直整合度高，具名供应商需等合同、招股书或年报进一步披露。
tiers.notesZh: SpaceX 垂直整合度高，具名供应商需等合同、招股书或年报进一步披露。
tiers.notesEn: SpaceX is highly vertically integrated; named suppliers should wait for contracts, prospectus detail, or annual-report disclosure.

tiers.title: Starlink satellites, terminals, and network

entities.name: 卫星与用户终端电子供应链
entities.nameZh: 卫星与用户终端电子供应链
entities.nameEn: Satellite and user-terminal electronics supply chain
entities.relationship: Starlink 卫星、用户终端和直连手机载荷需要射频前端、相控阵、计算/电源管理、激光链路、太阳能和电池系统。
entities.relationshipZh: Starlink 卫星、用户终端和直连手机载荷需要射频前端、相控阵、计算/电源管理、激光链路、太阳能和电池系统。
entities.relationshipEn: Starlink satellites, user terminals, and direct-to-cell payloads require RF front ends, phased arrays, compute/power management, laser links, solar, and battery systems.
productsServices: 太阳能电池、锂电与光通信
productsServicesZh: 太阳能电池、锂电与光通信
productsServicesEn: solar cells, batteries, and optical communications

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Converts chips, networking, cooling, and system design into deliverable systems; strong relevance but usually below manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: 地面站、骨干网络与云/边缘节点
entities.nameZh: 地面站、骨干网络与云/边缘节点
entities.nameEn: Ground stations, backbone network, and cloud/edge nodes
entities.relationship: Starlink 的服务质量依赖全球地面站、网络互联、客户安装和企业/移动业务支持。
entities.relationshipZh: Starlink 的服务质量依赖全球地面站、网络互联、客户安装和企业/移动业务支持。
entities.relationshipEn: Starlink service quality depends on global ground stations, network interconnect, customer installation, and enterprise/mobile support.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于供应链上游或配套服务层，对交付和成本有影响，但短期瓶颈属性需继续核实。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于供应链上游或配套服务层，对交付和成本有影响，但短期瓶颈属性需继续核实。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in an upstream or supporting-service layer and can affect delivery and cost, but near-term bottleneck attributes need further verification.

companies: 卫星与用户终端电子供应链
地面站、骨干网络与云/边缘节点
materials: 砷化镓/氮化镓 RF 材料
materialsZh: 砷化镓/氮化镓 RF 材料
tiers.notes: Starlink 电子与网络供应商目前以类别处理；可在后续 filings 或合同披露后升级为具名公司。
tiers.notesZh: Starlink 电子与网络供应商目前以类别处理；可在后续 filings 或合同披露后升级为具名公司。
tiers.notesEn: Starlink electronics and network suppliers are tracked by category for now; they can be upgraded to named companies after filings or contract disclosure.

tiers.title: AI and data-center infrastructure
tiers.titleZh: AI 与数据中心基础设施

entities.name: AI 加速器、服务器和电力/冷却供应链
entities.nameZh: AI 加速器、服务器和电力/冷却供应链
entities.nameEn: AI accelerator, server, power, and cooling supply chain
entities.relationship: IPO 报道将 SpaceX 的估值叙事与 AI 基础设施联系起来；具体芯片、服务器和电力/冷却供应商需要等待更直接披露。
entities.relationshipZh: IPO 报道将 SpaceX 的估值叙事与 AI 基础设施联系起来；具体芯片、服务器和电力/冷却供应商需要等待更直接披露。
entities.relationshipEn: IPO coverage links SpaceX's valuation narrative to AI infrastructure; specific chip, server, power, and cooling suppliers need more direct disclosure.

relationshipStrength.label: 主题线索
relationshipStrength.rationale: 目前主要由 IPO 新闻和估值叙事连接到 AI 基础设施，缺少直接供应商或合同披露，不能按核心瓶颈处理。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 目前主要由 IPO 新闻和估值叙事连接到 AI 基础设施，缺少直接供应商或合同披露，不能按核心瓶颈处理。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The link currently comes from IPO news and valuation narrative around AI infrastructure, without direct supplier or contract disclosure, so it should not be treated as a core bottleneck.

companies: AI 加速器、服务器和电力/冷却供应链
tiers.notes: 这是 IPO 后新增的观察层，当前置信度低于传统发射和 Starlink 业务。
tiers.notesZh: 这是 IPO 后新增的观察层，当前置信度低于传统发射和 Starlink 业务。
tiers.notesEn: This is a post-IPO watch layer and currently has lower confidence than the legacy launch and Starlink businesses.

rawMaterials.name: 液氧与液态甲烷
rawMaterials.usedIn: 用于 Raptor/Starship 等推进系统与发射运营。
rawMaterials.usedInZh: 用于 Raptor/Starship 等推进系统与发射运营。
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Used in Raptor/Starship propulsion systems and launch operations.
upstream: 天然气处理与空气分离
upstreamZh: 天然气处理与空气分离
rawMaterials.risk: 发射频率越高，对低温供应、场站储存和许可节奏越敏感。
rawMaterials.riskZh: 发射频率越高，对低温供应、场站储存和许可节奏越敏感。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Higher launch cadence increases sensitivity to cryogenic supply, on-site storage, and permitting cadence.

rawMaterials.name: 不锈钢、铝、钛与镍基合金
rawMaterials.nameZh: 不锈钢、铝、钛与镍基合金
rawMaterials.nameEn: Stainless steel, aluminum, titanium, and nickel alloys

rawMaterials.usedInZh: 用于火箭结构、发动机、压力容器、航天器结构和热端零件。
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Used in rocket structures, engines, pressure vessels, spacecraft structures, and hot-section components.
rawMaterials.risk: 关键瓶颈在认证周期、合金一致性、热端可靠性和价格波动。
rawMaterials.riskZh: 关键瓶颈在认证周期、合金一致性、热端可靠性和价格波动。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Key bottlenecks include qualification cycles, alloy consistency, hot-section reliability, and price volatility.

rawMaterials.nameZh: RF 半导体、计算芯片与电源元件

rawMaterials.usedInZh: 用于 Starlink 卫星、用户终端、直连手机载荷、航电和地面网络。
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Used in Starlink satellites, user terminals, direct-to-cell payloads, avionics, and ground networks.

upstreamZh: 硅晶圆与化合物半导体材料
航天级筛选与可靠性测试
upstreamEn: silicon wafers and compound semiconductor materials
rawMaterials.risk: 受先进制程产能、RF 材料供应、出口管制和航天可靠性验证影响。
rawMaterials.riskZh: 受先进制程产能、RF 材料供应、出口管制和航天可靠性验证影响。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Affected by advanced-node capacity, RF material supply, export controls, and space-reliability validation.

rawMaterials.name: 太阳能、电池与热管理材料
rawMaterials.nameZh: 太阳能、电池与热管理材料
rawMaterials.usedIn: 用于卫星电源、终端电源、数据中心和航天器热管理。
rawMaterials.usedInZh: 用于卫星电源、终端电源、数据中心和航天器热管理。
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Used in satellite power, terminal power, data centers, and spacecraft thermal management.
upstream: 热界面材料与冷却设备
upstreamZh: 热界面材料与冷却设备
rawMaterials.risk: 卫星规模和 AI 基础设施资本开支可能放大对能源与热管理供应链的需求。
rawMaterials.riskZh: 卫星规模和 AI 基础设施资本开支可能放大对能源与热管理供应链的需求。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Satellite scale and AI-infrastructure capex can amplify demand for energy and thermal-management supply chains.

downstream.thesis: SpaceX 处在航天供应链中游到下游的交叉位置：它向政府、商业卫星客户、消费者/企业宽带用户、移动运营商伙伴和 AI 基础设施客户输出发射、通信和计算能力。
downstream.thesisZh: SpaceX 处在航天供应链中游到下游的交叉位置：它向政府、商业卫星客户、消费者/企业宽带用户、移动运营商伙伴和 AI 基础设施客户输出发射、通信和计算能力。
downstream.thesisEn: SpaceX sits across the midstream and downstream of the space value chain: it sells launch, communications, and compute capabilities to governments, commercial satellite customers, consumer/enterprise broadband users, mobile-operator partners, and AI-infrastructure customers.

tiers.title: Government and institutional customers
tiers.notes: 政府合同提供需求韧性，但项目节点、预算和监管审查会影响收入节奏。
tiers.notesZh: 政府合同提供需求韧性，但项目节点、预算和监管审查会影响收入节奏。
tiers.notesEn: Government contracts provide demand resilience, but program milestones, budgets, and regulatory reviews affect revenue timing.

entities.name: NASA
entities.relationship: NASA 商业载人与 Artemis HLS 是 SpaceX Dragon/Starship 的核心公开政府项目；HLS 合同总额为 28.9 亿美元。
entities.relationshipZh: NASA 商业载人与 Artemis HLS 是 SpaceX Dragon/Starship 的核心公开政府项目；HLS 合同总额为 28.9 亿美元。
entities.relationshipEn: NASA commercial crew and Artemis HLS are core public government programs for SpaceX Dragon/Starship; the HLS contract award value is $2.89 billion.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

tiers.title: Starlink consumers, enterprises, and telecom partners
tiers.titleZh: Starlink 消费者、企业与电信伙伴
tiers.titleEn: Starlink consumers, enterprises, and telecom partners
tiers.notes: Starlink 是 SpaceX 最大的业务抓手之一；移动运营商伙伴使直连手机成为下游扩张方向。
tiers.notesZh: Starlink 是 SpaceX 最大的业务抓手之一；移动运营商伙伴使直连手机成为下游扩张方向。
tiers.notesEn: Starlink is one of SpaceX's largest business levers; mobile-operator partners make direct-to-cell a downstream expansion path.

entities.name: T-Mobile US
entities.relationship: T-Mobile 与 SpaceX/Starlink 的直连手机合作将 Starlink 卫星能力接入地面移动用户；这是下游分发与网络覆盖合作，而不是传统零部件供应关系。
entities.relationshipZh: T-Mobile 与 SpaceX/Starlink 的直连手机合作将 Starlink 卫星能力接入地面移动用户；这是下游分发与网络覆盖合作，而不是传统零部件供应关系。
entities.relationshipEn: The T-Mobile and SpaceX/Starlink direct-to-cell partnership connects Starlink satellite capability to terrestrial mobile users; it is downstream distribution/network-coverage cooperation, not a conventional component-supply relationship.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

entities.name: Starlink broadband users
entities.relationship: 包括家庭、企业、航空、海事和偏远地区用户；这是 Starlink 订阅和终端销售的核心下游。
entities.relationshipZh: 包括家庭、企业、航空、海事和偏远地区用户；这是 Starlink 订阅和终端销售的核心下游。
entities.relationshipEn: Includes residential, enterprise, aviation, maritime, and remote-area users; this is the core downstream for Starlink subscriptions and terminal sales.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

tiers.title: AI infrastructure customers and hyperscale partners
tiers.titleZh: AI 基础设施客户与云/超大规模伙伴
tiers.titleEn: AI infrastructure customers and hyperscale partners
tiers.notes: 该层是 IPO 后新叙事，需等待后续披露验证客户名单、合同规模和收入确认方式。
tiers.notesZh: 该层是 IPO 后新叙事，需等待后续披露验证客户名单、合同规模和收入确认方式。
tiers.notesEn: This is a post-IPO narrative layer and needs later disclosures to verify customer names, contract scale, and revenue-recognition treatment.

entities.name: AI model and cloud customers
entities.relationship: IPO 报道称 AI 与数据中心基础设施是 SpaceX 新增长叙事之一；当前仅按客户群跟踪，暂不落具体客户名单。
entities.relationshipZh: IPO 报道称 AI 与数据中心基础设施是 SpaceX 新增长叙事之一；当前仅按客户群跟踪，暂不落具体客户名单。
entities.relationshipEn: IPO coverage describes AI and data-center infrastructure as one of SpaceX's new growth narratives; this dataset tracks the customer group only and does not yet name specific customers.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Large cloud or platform customers affect demand expectations, but the transmission sits on the purchasing and application side and is weaker than supply bottlenecks.

scarceLayers.name: AI 与数据中心基础设施
scarceLayers.nameZh: AI 与数据中心基础设施
scarceLayers.whyScarce: 这是 IPO 后新增的观察层，当前置信度低于传统发射和 Starlink 业务。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: 这是 IPO 后新增的观察层，当前置信度低于传统发射和 Starlink 业务。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: This is a post-IPO watch layer and currently has lower confidence than the legacy launch and Starlink businesses.
relatedCompanies: AI 加速器、服务器和电力/冷却供应链

failureConditions.condition: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。

failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor supplier filings, capacity guidance, customer qualification, pricing, and delivery lead times.

scarceLayers.nameZh: 火箭、航天器与发射运营
scarceLayers.whyScarce: SpaceX 垂直整合度高，具名供应商需等合同、招股书或年报进一步披露。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: SpaceX 垂直整合度高，具名供应商需等合同、招股书或年报进一步披露。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: SpaceX is highly vertically integrated; named suppliers should wait for contracts, prospectus detail, or annual-report disclosure.
relatedCompanies: 航天级结构材料与推进剂供应链
发射场、地面设备与测试基础设施

failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor supplier filings, capacity guidance, customer qualification, pricing, and delivery lead times.

scarceLayers.whyScarce: Starlink 电子与网络供应商目前以类别处理；可在后续 filings 或合同披露后升级为具名公司。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: Starlink 电子与网络供应商目前以类别处理；可在后续 filings 或合同披露后升级为具名公司。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: Starlink electronics and network suppliers are tracked by category for now; they can be upgraded to named companies after filings or contract disclosure.
relatedCompanies: 卫星与用户终端电子供应链
地面站、骨干网络与云/边缘节点

highlights.changeEn: Reported as the largest IPO on record

highlights.label: 首日收盘价
highlights.change: 较 IPO 定价上涨约 19%
highlights.changeZh: 较 IPO 定价上涨约 19%

highlights.change: Starlink 被报道为主要收入来源
highlights.changeZh: Starlink 被报道为主要收入来源
highlights.changeEn: Starlink was reported as the main revenue source

revenueMix.name: Starlink 卫星互联网
revenueMix.note: 报道称 Starlink 约占 SpaceX FY2025 收入的 60%，对应约 112.2 亿美元。
revenueMix.noteZh: 报道称 Starlink 约占 SpaceX FY2025 收入的 60%，对应约 112.2 亿美元。
revenueMix.noteEn: Reports said Starlink represented about 60% of SpaceX FY2025 revenue, or roughly $11.22 billion.

revenueMix.name: 发射服务
revenueMix.note: 报道称 2025 年发射业务收入约 40.9 亿美元。
revenueMix.noteZh: 报道称 2025 年发射业务收入约 40.9 亿美元。
revenueMix.noteEn: Reports said launch revenue was about $4.09 billion in 2025.

revenueMix.name: AI/X 与其他业务
revenueMix.note: 报道提到 AI/社交媒体相关收入约 32 亿美元，其余归入其他业务；该拆分需后续 filings 验证。
revenueMix.noteZh: 报道提到 AI/社交媒体相关收入约 32 亿美元，其余归入其他业务；该拆分需后续 filings 验证。
revenueMix.noteEn: Reports cited about $3.2 billion of AI/social-media related revenue, with the residual grouped here as other; this split needs later filing validation.

revenueMixHistory.note: 仅有 IPO 报道口径的单期收入构成；暂不做多年趋势判断。
revenueMixHistory.noteZh: 仅有 IPO 报道口径的单期收入构成；暂不做多年趋势判断。
revenueMixHistory.noteEn: Only one IPO-reported revenue-mix period is available; no multi-year trend is inferred yet.

news.title: SpaceX 在 Nasdaq 以 SPCX 上市
news.titleZh: SpaceX 在 Nasdaq 以 SPCX 上市
news.titleEn: SpaceX lists on Nasdaq under SPCX
news.summary: Nasdaq 已显示 Space Exploration Technologies Corp. Class A Common Stock，代码 SPCX；多家媒体报道称 SpaceX IPO 融资约 750 亿美元，首日收盘约 160.95 美元。
news.summaryZh: Nasdaq 已显示 Space Exploration Technologies Corp. Class A Common Stock，代码 SPCX；多家媒体报道称 SpaceX IPO 融资约 750 亿美元，首日收盘约 160.95 美元。
news.summaryEn: Nasdaq now shows Space Exploration Technologies Corp. Class A Common Stock under SPCX; multiple outlets reported about $75 billion in IPO proceeds and a first-day close around $160.95.
news.impact: SpaceX 已从不可直接交易的主题锚点变成可查询的美股标的；原有 SpaceX/Starlink 可比公司关系需要重标为上市主题关联。
news.impactZh: SpaceX 已从不可直接交易的主题锚点变成可查询的美股标的；原有 SpaceX/Starlink 可比公司关系需要重标为上市主题关联。
news.impactEn: SpaceX has moved from a non-tradable theme anchor to a searchable U.S.-listed stock; existing SpaceX/Starlink comparable-company links should be relabeled as public theme links.

news.title: IPO 后估值和收入结构成为核心分歧
news.titleZh: IPO 后估值和收入结构成为核心分歧
news.titleEn: Post-IPO valuation and revenue mix become key debate
news.summary: IPO 报道称 SpaceX FY2025 收入约 187 亿美元，Starlink 是主要收入来源；同时市场对高估值、AI 基础设施资本开支和治理结构保持关注。
news.summaryZh: IPO 报道称 SpaceX FY2025 收入约 187 亿美元，Starlink 是主要收入来源；同时市场对高估值、AI 基础设施资本开支和治理结构保持关注。
news.summaryEn: IPO coverage cited FY2025 revenue of about $18.7 billion and Starlink as the main revenue source, while investors continue to focus on high valuation, AI-infrastructure capex, and governance structure.
news.impact: 后续应优先跟踪正式 10-Q/10-K、分部披露和现金流，而不是单日股价叙事。
news.impactZh: 后续应优先跟踪正式 10-Q/10-K、分部披露和现金流，而不是单日股价叙事。
news.impactEn: Future updates should prioritize formal 10-Q/10-K filings, segment disclosure, and cash flow rather than one-day trading narratives.

themeExposure.role: 发射、卫星与商业航天核心平台
themeExposure.roleZh: 发射、卫星与商业航天核心平台
themeExposure.roleEn: Launch, satellite, and commercial-space core platform
themeExposure.rationale: 公司直接处于发射服务、卫星互联网和政府航天任务核心位置，是太空主题的锚点。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 公司直接处于发射服务、卫星互联网和政府航天任务核心位置，是太空主题的锚点。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: The company sits directly at the center of launch services, satellite internet, and government space missions, anchoring the space theme.
